task: put the money away in the safe on the bottom shelf
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A robotic arm is positioned above a gray safe with a small green object (money) on top. The safe has a door with a handle. The task is to place the money inside the safe. STRATEGY - First, grasp the money, then transport it to the safe's door, and finally insert it into the safe's opening. Failure modes include dropping the money during transport or misaligning it with the safe's opening. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the money on the safe's top surface. Step 2: Grasp the money at its body. Step 3: Transport the money to the safe's door handle area. Step 4: Insert the money into the safe's opening near the handle.
Goal: inside(money, safe)
Scene: money, safe, robotic_arm
Step 1: reach(money)
  affordance_region: the body of the green money
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, money, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, money) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(money)
  affordance_region: the body of the green money
  contact: holding(money) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(money)
Step 3: transport(money -> safe)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the safe near the handle
  spatial: above(money, safe, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(money)
  done_when: above(money, safe, 0.05)
Step 4: insert(money -> safe)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the safe near the handle
  contact: surface_contact(money, safe) [completion]; released(money) [completion]
  pose: inside(money, safe) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(money, safe) AND released(money)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green money
the body of the green money
the top surface of the safe near the handle
the top opening of the safe near the handle
